pageSubtitle: Experience the legend of the most iconic football stadium in the world

tourHighlights.description: Sit in the official press conference room

ticketTypes.name: Standard Tour

ticketTypes.name: Premium Guided Tour
ticketTypes.description: Expert-guided tour with access to exclusive areas

ticketTypes.name: VIP Experience

openingHours:
Monday – Saturday: 9:30am – 7:00pm
Sunday & Public Holidays: 10:30am – 6:30pm
Closed on match days and special events
locationAddress: Av. de Concha Espina, 1, 28036 Madrid, Spain
practicalInfo: Accessible entrance available on the north side of the stadium. Large bags and luggage not permitted. Photography is allowed throughout the tour. The tour takes approximately 90 minutes.
metaTitle: Tour Bernabéu | Real Madrid CF — Book Your Visit
metaDescription: Discover the iconic Santiago Bernabéu stadium. Explore the trophy museum, pitch, dressing rooms, and more. Book your self-guided or premium guided tour today.
